inline_comments.message:
instead of oxm-override, you can specify oxm-default which will use the latest OXM version available from the OXM directory.  You don't need a properties file for oxm-default.

You can also keep the oxm-override properties file in the chart, as it becomes something that could be used quickly to override the API version if needed, simply by changing the oxm-default -> oxm-override profile.
As part of making the test-config changes you also need to change how the config map works the wind river vm deploy.yaml files as well right?
